1:
Tazel Meyean has asked you craft for him four high-quality larboard wing components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. In order to obtain the requisite materials, you must first gather fifteen small granite rocks and five large granite rocks in the area west of Peacegarden.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

4:
Hildeyerd has prepared the crafting facility for your use. With the materials you have obtained, synthesize four high-quality larboard wing components, and deliver them to Tazel Meyean at Ehcatl.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Detailing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Hildeyerd.
